title: Telehealth doctor treats patients using Razer Naga gaming mouse 12-button MMO thumb grid simplifies medical workflow, automates medical scripting
summary: Dr. James Ries uses his Razer Naga V2 gaming mouse to streamline patient care by accessing relevant medical responses through its 12-button thumb grid, simplifying his medical workflow and automating medical scripting.
insight: Gamification technology can enhance medical efficiency in healthcare settings

title: Creality Falcon T1 Review: Modular laser engraving
summary: The Creality Falcon T1 is a modular galvo laser engraver with swappable modules for various materials. It offers a promising platform with a conveyor belt, rotary attachment, and air filter, but initially lacks two available modules. The base price is $2,249.
insight: Adaptable laser technology for diverse material engraving options

title: Age of Empires II s goats used as AI building blocks to build a neural network goaty experiment mocks the idea of chatbot consciousness, Microsoft AI researcher s project makes an absurdist point about AI consciousness
summary: A Microsoft AI researcher uses Age of Empires II's game mechanics to create a neural network that mimics the actions of goats, satirically highlighting the tendency to attribute human-like qualities to AI chatbots.
insight: Anthropomorphism in AI can lead to oversimplification of consciousness.

title: Acoustic mapping app uses thousands of networked old Android phones to hunt Shahed drones crowd-sourced microphone network spots small, low-RCS military targets
summary: An acoustic mapping app utilizes networked Android phones to detect and track Shahed drones, providing real-time location and direction data, enabling crowd-sourced early warning systems and enhanced military defense capabilities.
insight: Crowdsourced acoustic detection enhances military defense against low-RCS targets.

title: Save $300 on this 1440p-ready gaming PC with 32GB DDR5 RAM grab the Asus ROG GM700 with AMD's Ryzen 7 8700F and RX 9060 XT for just $1,199
summary: The Asus ROG GM700 offers a powerful prebuilt gaming PC with a solid price and gamer aesthetic.
insight: Budget-conscious gamers get high-performance components for a low price tag.

title: Award-winning resin 3D printer for beginners is 36% off grab the Anycubic Photon P1 with dual-color material kit for $619.99
summary: Get the Anycubic Photon P1, a highly-regarded resin 3D printer for beginners, at a discounted price of $619.99. It boasts a precision steel build plate and wireless printing support. This package includes a dual-color material kit.
insight: Beginner-friendly resin 3D printer offers exceptional print quality at a low cost.

title: China unifies tech sector to build grid-free orbiting satellite AI data centers, challenging Elon Musk's SpaceX Beijing's forced chip and satellite alliance announced a week before Musk s AI1 reveal
summary: China's Space Computing Industry Innovation Center unites tech sectors to build grid-free satellite AI data centers, challenging Elon Musk's SpaceX. This initiative aims to develop a space-based data center system. It's a strategic move to reduce reliance on traditional infrastructure.
insight: China gains independence from Earth's grid with space-based AI data centers

title: New web app can make Valve's Steam Controller drift across your desk like an RC car web app drives the gamepad using its rumble motors
summary: A developer has created a browser-based tool that converts the Steam Controller into an RC car, utilizing its rumble motors to move around on a desk.
insight: Innovative repurposing of gaming hardware into new, interactive devices

title: The best 3D scanners 2026 the top performing models we've benchmarked
summary: Discover the top-performing 3D scanners of 2026, optimized for accuracy, portability, and more. Our in-depth benchmarking helps you find the best fit for your needs. From handheld devices to industrial-grade scanners, we've got you covered.
insight: Advanced 3D scanning technology revolutionizes industries with precision and efficiency.

title: Intel and AMD's new ACE CPU extensions bring an efficient AI-oriented instruction set to x86 a new design makes matrix multiplication more power- and density-efficient
summary: Intel and AMD introduce ACE CPU extensions to enhance AI performance on x86 architecture with a new design that optimizes matrix multiplication, leading to improved power efficiency and density.
insight: Accelerated AI performance via optimized matrix multiplication

title: Unlucky PC builder sent RTX 5070 from Amazon, gets DVD rewriter and a busted logic board from an early 2000's Kenwood AV receiver instead $700 GPU turns out to be e-waste thanks to return scam
summary: A PC builder received a $700 RTX 5070 as e-waste due to an Amazon return scam, getting a DVD rewriter, a mousepad, and a busted logic board from an old Kenwood AV receiver instead. This highlights the risks of Amazon's lenient return policy.
insight: Amazon's return policy can facilitate e-waste scams and consumer loss.

title: SpacemiT K3 Pico-ITX RISC-V Chassis Kit Review Part 2: What works, what doesn t in Bianbu OS 4.0
summary: The review continues with the SpacemiT K3 Pico-ITX Chassis Kit mini PC, testing system information, benchmarks, networking performance, and power consumption under Bianbu OS 4.0. The system is updated before running any tests, and the update process for the Embedded Controller firmware is also mentioned.
insight: RISC-V SoC's performance and features are thoroughly evaluated in this review.

title: Scientists made espresso with sound instead of heat, and most drinkers couldn't tell the difference
summary: Researchers at UNSW Sydney developed 'ultrasonic espresso' using sound waves instead of heat to extract flavors from coffee, producing espresso-level intensity in under three minutes at room temperature.
insight: Efficient, low-temperature coffee extraction challenges traditional high-heat methods.

title: Yann LeCun says xAI is "kind of a failure" and the whole AI industry might be headed for a reset
summary: Yann LeCun, former Meta chief AI scientist, criticizes xAI as a failure due to key team departures.
insight: AI industry reset possible due to leadership and team instability issues.

title: Windows 11 26H2 continues Microsoft's shift to smaller and faster updates
summary: Microsoft continues to shift towards smaller and faster Windows updates, focusing on extending support timelines rather than introducing new features, a trend that started with Windows 11 24H2.
insight: Smaller updates prioritize stability over new feature development.

title: Nothing scraps next CMF phone after memory prices make it too expensive
summary: Nothing scraps CMF phone successor due to high memory costs.
insight: High memory costs threaten Nothing's minimalist brand identity.
